[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in a white outfit is crouched or kneeling on a grassy yard, with several large bicycle wheels visible in the foreground and bold text “ASELI” overlaid near the bottom.

Main Subject:
A person with light-colored hair and a white top and pants is positioned mid-background, facing toward the camera while holding or standing near a black object close to their lap; in the foreground, three large wheel-like circular shapes are visible, including a wheel on the left and another on the right, with additional circular wheel forms behind them.

Setting:
The scene appears outdoors in a grassy area with a path or paved surface running through the middle; there is greenery and shrubs or trees in the background, and a building-like structure is faintly visible to the upper right. The lighting looks like daylight, though the exact time of day is unclear.

Visual Details:
The image is slightly blurry and low-resolution, with a compressed or pixelated look. The person wears light clothing (white top and white pants) and is captured in a crouched or kneeling posture. The foreground wheel on the left appears pale or cream-colored with a dark inner opening, while the right wheel appears darker gray or black. The overlaid text “ASELI” is large, white with a black outline, positioned across the bottom center of the image.

Visible Text:
ASELI

Practical Summary:
The image shows an outdoor grassy yard with a person in white clothing kneeling or crouching near black objects. Large wheel shapes are visible in the foreground, and the word “ASELI” is displayed prominently at the bottom.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
